prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph. London suburban home living room, evening 6:30 PM. A mixed British family watching TV together on the sofa. James (father, 44, White British, slightly long brown hair, casual shirt, gentle expression) sits on one end. Zara (daughter, 16, Mixed race, wavy semi-long hair, trendy casual teen outfit, slightly grown-up expression) and Marcus (son, 13, Mixed race, short hair, sporty clothes, energetic posture) sit together in the middle. Naomi (mother, 42, Black British, short natural hair) stands slightly apart, holding her smartphone — the remote. In the far background on the sofa corner, Theo (7, Mixed race, curly hair, small) is absorbed in an iPad. The TV is the main light source — its screen casts a bright white-blue glow on the family's faces (the TV content itself is overexposed, just a bright light). A floor lamp provides warm ambient light. Last traces of evening light through the window. Color grading: warm evening golden tones. Film-like desaturation. The TV light creates interesting cool highlights on warm skin. Natural skin tones across different ethnicities rendered honestly and beautifully. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. Living room shown broadly. The family is center-lower frame on the sofa. TV glow dominates upper portion. Warm lamp provides bokeh accent. Camera: 35mm lens, f/3.2, ISO 400. Film grain. TV light creates gentle flare. Theo is soft bokeh background. The mood is family togetherness — choosing something together on a weekday evening.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, posed portrait, stock photo, all same ethnicity, dark room, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration
